creator: farrokhi@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Steve Wills from comment #1)

Updated the patch:

- Move plist from Makefile to pkg-plist
- Remove ${STRIP} given that shared libs are already stripped during install
- Pet portlint

# portlint -a
looks fine.

Successful build on poudriere:

# tail timescaledb-0.10.1.log
Installed packages to be REMOVED:
        timescaledb-0.10.1

Number of packages to be removed: 1

The operation will free 1 MiB.
[11-stable-default] [1/1] Deinstalling timescaledb-0.10.1...
[11-stable-default] [1/1] Deleting files for timescaledb-0.10.1: .......... done
build of databases/timescaledb | timescaledb-0.10.1 ended at Sun Jul 15 19:04:41 +0430 2018
build time: 00:04:32
